datasets.label: OSERA Demo Data (Example)
datasets.description: Small curated walkthrough dataset shaped to exercise the main Risk Navigator workflows.
datasets.coverage: Synthetic project and dependency inventory with hand-shaped remediation scenarios.
datasets.limitations: Demo data for UI walkthroughs; not derived from live FINOS repositories.

datasets.label: FINOS SBOM Scan Demo
datasets.description: Compact FINOS repository SBOM demo showing the CycloneDX import path.
datasets.coverage: Small selected FINOS repository names with committed CycloneDX dependency graphs aligned to the sample OSV seed.
datasets.limitations: Compact demo inputs; full repo scans depend on scanner support, lockfiles, and available public repository metadata.

datasets.label: FINOS Deep SBOM Demo
datasets.description: Curated multi-ecosystem FINOS demo with explicit direct/transitive SBOM graph relationships.
datasets.coverage: 8 selected FINOS repositories; Maven, npm, PyPI, OCI base-image, and RPM child-package examples.
datasets.limitations: Demo input, not an authoritative current SBOM for those repositories.

datasets.label: FINOS GitHub Org Snapshot
datasets.description: Broad public FINOS GitHub organization snapshot built from public repository metadata and manifest extraction.
datasets.coverage: 132 active non-fork public FINOS repositories; 97 repositories with extracted dependency edges in the committed snapshot.
datasets.limitations: Broad but often shallow: manifest extraction can be direct-only and does not fully resolve every build-system dependency graph.
